_comment_strategy: PFAA Bitcoin Strategy (OPTIMIZED) — mean-reversion + accumulation strategy for post-peak correction regime
_comment_market: BTC at $66.6K, -47% from ATH $126,198 (Oct 6, 2025). Extreme fear (F&G: 8). 86% indicators bearish. aSOPR 0.97-0.99 (capitulation). MVRV Z-Score 1.2. Exchange reserves at 7-year low (accumulation). 5 on-chain bottom signals converging. Support: $65K, $62K, $60K (200wk MA). Resistance: $69K, $72K (major), $80K.
_comment_approach: Mean-reversion (buy dips to support, sell at resistance) + multi-signal scoring (EMA+RSI+BB+MACD+Vol) with ATR trailing stops. Single-position sizing to avoid correlated risk.
_comment_hyperopt: Run: freqtrade hyperopt --strategy PFAABitcoinStrategy --hyperopt-loss CalmarHyperOptLoss --epochs 1000 --spaces buy sell roi stoploss trailing (CalmarHyperOptLoss preferred over SharpeHyperOptLoss for drawdown control in choppy correction markets)
_comment_hyperopt_tips: Use --timerange 20251001-20260328 for recent market regime. SortinoHyperOptLoss is also a good alternative for downside-risk-focused optimization.

changes: max_open_trades: 3 -> 1 — Single-pair BTC/USDT strategy must not open multiple concurrent positions. 3 correlated BTC positions means 3x drawdown on any BTC drop, violating basic risk management.
stake_amount: 'unlimited' -> 0.95 — Deploy 95% of available balance per trade with a 5% buffer for fees, slippage, and margin-of-safety. Prevents over-allocation that could cause order failures.
process_throttle_secs: 5 -> 3 — Faster candle processing loop for tighter signal response. Reduces latency between signal detection and order placement.
Updated market comments to reflect March 2026 conditions and consolidation regime.
Added expanded hyperopt hints: full search space flags (buy sell roi stoploss trailing) and recommended timerange.
